rationale: Single pure function in a new file reading standard browser APIs. No side effects, no storage, no network calls. Aligns exactly with CLAUDE.md recommended module split (src/input/signals.ts). Zero modification to existing files means zero regression risk.
recommendations: Ensure BrowserSignals interface is exported so downstream consumers (US-004 sessionSeed) can import the type directly

risk_per_file.src/input/signals.ts: NONE — new leaf module, no imports from project code

dependency_check.notes: US-001 (project scaffold) is marked complete. No runtime dependencies beyond browser globals.

privacy_compliance.notes: All signals are low-entropy standard APIs. No cookies, no localStorage, no fetch, no geolocation prompt. Consistent with CLAUDE.md core rules.
